subcodes.first_line: In this day the Call of the Sovereign Lord of Power hath been raised from the Most Great Horizon. Blessed is the soul that hath attained unto recognition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز ندای مالک قدر از منظر اکبر مرتفع نیکوست حال نفسیکه بعرفان فائز شد
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
